title: Request rate
description: Requests per second across all demo API pods. Uses a 30s demo window so Traffic Lab actions show quickly after the next scrape.

title: 5xx error rate
description: Server errors per second for the demo API. Uses a 30s demo window for visibility.

title: Error percentage
description: Percent of demo API requests returning 5xx errors.

title: Availability SLI vs dashboard SLO
description: Percent of demo API requests that avoid 5xx responses. Compare this result with the dashboard Availability SLO variable.

title: Latency SLI under 500ms vs dashboard SLO
description: Percent of demo API requests completed under 500ms. 500ms matches a default Python Prometheus histogram bucket and is the dashboard default.

title: Error budget burn rate
description: How fast the demo API is consuming a 5 percent demo error budget. A value above 2 matches the default fast-burn threshold.

title: P95 latency by tenant
description: 95 percent of requests are faster than this value, grouped by tenant. Uses a 10m bucket rate because sparse local demo traffic can make short histogram windows noisy.

title: Status code breakdown
description: Request rate grouped by HTTP status code.

title: 5xx errors in demo window
description: Count of server errors seen in the last 30 seconds. Useful when rate panels take a scrape cycle to move.

title: Scrape target health
description: Shows whether Prometheus can scrape demo API targets. 1 is up, 0 is down.
